hero.title:
Udon Thani
International Horticultural
Expo 2026
hero.subtitle: Where Nature Meets Innovation
hero.location: Nong Da Wetland, Kut Sa, Mueang, Udon Thani, Thailand

about.title: About the Expo
about.subtitle: Udon Thani International Horticultural Expo 2026
about.description: The first International Horticultural Expo in Northeastern Thailand, held under the theme "Nature and Sustainability," promoting eco-tourism, green innovation, and international cooperation.
about.history: Udon Thani was selected as the host city due to its rich natural resources, the ecologically significant Nong Da Wetland, and the region's agricultural potential.
about.vision: To be a world-class platform showcasing Thailand's commitment to sustainable development and nature conservation.
about.mission: To inspire visitors through displays of horticultural innovation, agricultural technology, and environmental conservation.
about.objectives: Promote sustainable tourism, develop green innovation, conserve nature, advance agricultural technology, develop communities, and foster international cooperation.
about.importance: This event is crucial for the economic development, tourism, and international image of Udon Thani province and Thailand.

flowers.title: International Flower Gardens
flowers.desc: Witness the beauty of flowers from around the world displayed in magnificent gardens.

innovation.title: Agricultural Innovation
innovation.desc: Explore cutting-edge agricultural technology, green innovation, and smart farming.

wetlands.title: Nong Da Wetlands
wetlands.desc: Explore a vital wetland ecosystem, home to diverse plant and animal species.

pavilion.title: International Pavilion
pavilion.desc: Experience exhibitions from countries worldwide showcasing horticultural culture and innovation.

smartAgri.title: Smart Agriculture
smartAgri.desc: Learn about modern farming technology and digital farm management systems.

botanicalGarden.title: Botanical Garden
botanicalGarden.desc: A vast botanical garden featuring rare plant species from around the world.

culturalVillage.title: Cultural Village
culturalVillage.desc: Experience the lifestyle, culture, and local wisdom of Northeastern Thailand.

innovationHub.title: Innovation Hub
innovationHub.desc: Showcasing future agricultural technology, green innovation, and resource management.

flowerGarden.title: Flower Garden
flowerGarden.desc: Breathtaking flower gardens with perfect photo opportunities.

wetlandPark.title: Wetland Park
wetlandPark.desc: Nature trails through the Nong Da Wetland, rich with diverse ecosystems.

opening.title: Opening Ceremony
opening.desc: Grand opening ceremony with cultural performances and light & sound show.

midTerm.title: Mid-Expo Activities
midTerm.desc: Special events, academic conferences, workshops, and cultural performances throughout the expo.

newYear.title: New Year Festival
newYear.desc: Celebrate the New Year with spectacular flower displays, fireworks, and special events.

closing.title: Closing Ceremony
closing.desc: Grand closing ceremony summarizing the success and achievements of the expo.

visitorInfo.title: Visitor Information
visitorInfo.subtitle: Everything You Need to Know Before Your Visit

transport.title: Transportation
transport.byCar: By Car: From Udon Thani city center, take Highway 2 north for approximately 15 km.
transport.byBus: By Bus: Shuttle buses from Udon Thani bus station to the expo every 30 minutes.
transport.byTrain: By Train: Udon Thani railway station has shuttle service to the expo.

parking.title: Parking
parking.desc: Spacious parking with capacity for over 5,000 cars. Disabled parking available.

tickets.title: Tickets
tickets.note: Students in uniform enter free on weekdays

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.address: Nong Da Wetland, Kut Sa, Mueang, Udon Thani 41000, Thailand

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to Common Questions About the Expo
faq.q1: When is the Horticultural Expo held?
faq.a1: The expo runs from November 1, 2026 to March 14, 2027, a total of 134 days.
faq.a2: Nong Da Wetland, Kut Sa Subdistrict, Mueang District, Udon Thani Province, approximately 15 km from the city center.
faq.a3: Adult: 200 THB, Child: 80 THB, Senior (60+): Free. Students in uniform enter free on weekdays.
faq.a4: Yes, spacious parking for over 5,000 cars with disabled parking spaces available.
faq.a5: Pets are not allowed inside the expo grounds, except for guide dogs for the visually impaired.
faq.a6: Yes, there is a large food zone offering Thai cuisine, international dishes, and local specialties.
faq.q7: Is the expo suitable for children?
faq.a7: Yes, the expo is family-friendly with many activities and learning areas for children.
faq.a8: Yes, shuttle buses run every 30 minutes from Udon Thani bus station and external parking areas.
faq.a9: Photography is allowed at all areas except where explicitly prohibited.
faq.q10: Can I buy tickets in advance?
faq.a10: Yes, you can purchase tickets online in advance through the official website or mobile application.
